response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI systems, direct cloud AI deployment leadership, or RAG/vector database implementation — key requirements for this staff-level role. His open-source work and workshops demonstrate technical depth and communication skills, but the resume omits explicit GenAI project outcomes, team leadership in enterprise AI delivery, and quantifiable impact on AI system performance or scalability.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or LLM systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited detail on leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders or mentoring teams in AI contexts
